current.en: Sorry Anthony, but Martin's Portugal shrugged off Modric, Perisic, and three disallowed goals to send Croatia packing with a stoppage-time Ramos header — your checkerboard dreams are toast! 🐓

history.en: Jordan's Spain put on a masterclass, sending Eleanor's Austria packing with a ruthless 3-0 hammering — no drama, no extra time, just pure Jordan dominance! 🇪🇸💥
Michael's USA march on as the Stars and Stripes send Michael's Bosnia packing 2-0 — even with 10 men, no mercy!
Ben B's Belgium break Megan's hearts — the Red Devils trailed 0-2 before Lukaku and Tielemans (twice!) staged an all-time comeback to send Senegal packing in extra time! 🔴😈
Baz's brave Three Lions survived an almighty scare before Kane's late double broke Emmy's Congolese hearts — Baz goes through, Emmy goes home!
Ben WL's Mexico light up the Azteca — a clinical 2-0 dumps Chris's Ecuador out and books El Tri a place in the last 16.
Tarang's France steamrolled James's Sweden 3-0 — no drama, no way back for the Swedes.
John's Norway snatch it late — a stoppage-time winner breaks Alex's Ivory Coast and roars into the last 16.

Penalty heartbreak all round: Martin's Paraguay buried Evie's Germany and Kate's Morocco dumped out Laura's Netherlands, both from the spot. Earlier, Joe's Brazil edged Emmy's Japan and Alex's Canada saw off Isaac's South Africa.
